ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label that released the album */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format in which the album is available */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Unique catalog number for the album */,
  "upc_ean" TEXT /* Universal Product Code or European Article Number */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the album is a compilation */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the album contains explicit content */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks on the album */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the album in minutes */,
  "artwork_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Musical genre of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the label's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the label */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the label's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the label's social media profiles */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the label was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., Vinyl, CD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "is_digital" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the format is digital */,
  "is_physical" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the format is physical */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the physical format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album in inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Number of copies available in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the inventory is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of albums sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, marketing, sales) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being promoted */,
  "promotion_start" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_end" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage for the promotion */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the album (1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback about the album */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of albums sold during this period */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated during this period */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of albums sold during the reporting period */,
  "most_popular_album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most popular album during the reporting period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_most_popular_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("most_popular_album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album adjusted */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of the adjustment (e.g., restock, shrinkage) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity adjusted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_adjustments_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_adjustments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels_users" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_users_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)
